data.command:
# Kill stale processes from previous runs (idempotent)
pkill -f 'pwa-kit-dev|node.*ssr|webpack' 2>/dev/null || true
pkill -f 'chromium|chrome' 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 2
# Start dev server (nohup keeps it alive after this shell exits)
nohup npm start > /tmp/smoke-server.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /tmp/smoke-server.pid
disown
echo "Pre: waiting for dev server (PID $(cat /tmp/smoke-server.pid))..."
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  sleep 5
  if curl -sf -o /dev/null http://localhost:3000/category/newarrivals 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "Pre: PLP returned HTTP 200 — SSR is healthy"
    exit 0
  fi
done
echo "Pre: PLP failed to return HTTP 200 after 120s — SSR is broken"
echo "Server log tail:" && tail -40 /tmp/smoke-server.log 2>/dev/null
# Clean up the server we started (only on failure)
kill "$(cat /tmp/smoke-server.pid)" 2>/dev/null || true
exit 1
